patches.find: radius ≈ 7,400 k (the Tropic of Cancer in dome coordinates — the most favorable case, as the equinox orbit at ~11,000 km would produce even greater variation)m.
patches.replace: radius ≈ 7,400 km (the Tropic of Cancer in dome coordinates — the most favorable case, as the equinox orbit at ~11,000 km would produce even greater variation).
patches.rationale: Formatting artifact: 'km' was split as 'k...m' when a parenthetical note was inserted mid-unit. Corrects to '7,400 km (...).'
